hero.title: Your operation doesn't need more improvisation.
hero.subtitle: We turn manual processes into systems for capturing leads, quoting and closing — so you stop depending on Excel, loose messages and messy follow-up.
hero.whatsappMsg: Hi Oscar. I'd like to book a B2B audit for my operation.

results.title: What changes when the engine goes live
results.item1: You go from quoting across loose files to responding with centralized logic.
results.item2: You cut manual errors in quotes, follow-up and documentation.
results.item3: You filter better before talking to each prospect.
results.item4: You organize your sales process without relying on human memory or improvisation.
results.item5: You turn a scattered operation into a clear system for selling and service.

segmentation.title: Two paths. Two systems.
segmentation.subtitle: Not everyone buys the same way. We design a different architecture for companies with complex operations and for professionals who need order.
segmentation.companiesDesc: If your operation no longer fits in Excel, we design a system to quote faster, reduce errors and issue documents instantly.
segmentation.prosDesc: If you depend on word of mouth, we build a system to capture better, filter prospects and convert more without saturating your time.

filter.p1: We don't take every client. If we don't see a clear opportunity to bring order or sell better, we'll tell you straight.
filter.p2: We'd rather turn down a project than promise smoke.
filter.step1Desc: You show us how you sell or quote today.
filter.step2Desc: We detect whether there's friction worth solving.
filter.step3Desc: If there's a fit, we present the system and the next step.

guarantee.title: Friction-free guarantee
guarantee.desc: We choose carefully. If we decide we're not the right team, you get 100% back. If there's no real satisfaction within the first 30 days, you get 100% back. No fine print.
guarantee.card2Desc: You don't carry the risk alone.

meta.title: Investing in Paraguay 2026: energy, agribusiness & logistics | AYCweb
meta.description: Investment grade (Moody's and S&P), >99% renewable energy with structural surplus and a bioceanic corridor underway. Sector dossiers and connections with local operators in Paraguay.

meta.ogDescription: >99% renewable energy, investment grade and a bioceanic corridor. Investment intelligence signed by AYCweb.

wa.dossier: Hi, I'm coming from the Investing in Paraguay page (aycweb.com/invertir-en-paraguay). My sector of interest is ___. I'd like to receive the dossier.
wa.call: Hi Oscar, I'm coming from aycweb.com/invertir-en-paraguay and I'd like to book the 30-minute strategy call.

hero.title: Investing in Paraguay:
hero.titleHighlight: the thesis, the data and the local network to execute it
hero.subtitle: >99% renewable energy with a structural surplus, investment grade from two rating agencies and a bioceanic corridor opening this year. We give you the verified map — and connect you with industrial, logistics and professional operators already working in the country.
hero.noCost: Free. No spam. We reply within 24 business hours.

thesis.body: Paraguay generates more electricity than it consumes and gives the surplus away at scrap prices: in 2025 it used 25,768 GWh of the 36,439 GWh it was entitled to from Itaipú, ceding the rest at ~US$ 15.7 per MWh while the regional price hovers around US$ 100. Each axis of this thesis is a different way to capture that gap.
thesis.source: Source: abc.com.py (Jan 2026, Aug 2025) · Data verified as of 06-10-2026

energia.title: Surplus energy, missing industry
energia.body: 8,760 MW of installed capacity against a peak demand of ~5,000 MW. Generation >99.9% renewable and an electricity market just opened to private players (Decree 6034/2026, planned tenders of 800 MW/year). The natural destination for the surplus: data centers, electro-intensive industries, hydrogen and decarbonized manufacturing.

agroindustria.title: Don't sell grain: process it
agroindustria.body: Every processed kilo multiplies export value. Plant proteins, animal feed, premium oils and biofuels — with cheap energy as a structural input no regional competitor can replicate.
agroindustria.item3: Animal genetics and industrial cold chain

tecnologia.title: The country is under-digitalized — and that's the opportunity
tecnologia.body: Most Paraguayan companies run sales on Excel and manual WhatsApp. The marginal return of every guaraní invested in commercial digitalization is high precisely because of that. It's the axis where AYCweb operates every day.
tecnologia.item1: B2B SaaS for industry and healthcare
tecnologia.item3: AI applied to logistics and production

logistica.title: The 8,000 km shortcut opens this year
logistica.body: The Carmelo Peralta–Puerto Murtinho bridge (~1,294 m) joins its two ends in June 2026 and the Capricorn Bioceanic Corridor (~2,000 km) aims to open in the second half of the year. For cargo headed to Asia, it cuts roughly 8,000 km versus Atlantic routes.

realEstate.title: Not residential: productive
realEstate.body: Warehouses, depots, industrial parks and distribution centers — the physical infrastructure the other four axes will demand. The maquila regime (a single 1% tax on value added within the country) gives every industrial square meter a natural tenant.

steps.title: 3 steps from the map to the ground
steps.step1Desc: A document with verified data and its sources, an introductory regulatory framework and a map of key players. Free of charge.
steps.step2Desc: We understand your objective, capital and timeline. We'll tell you honestly whether Paraguay fits your plan.
steps.step3Desc: Introductions to verified local operators and the digital infrastructure for your operation — built by AYCweb.
steps.note: Initial introductions are free. Ongoing support and digital infrastructure are quoted per project scope.

who.kicker: A firm that operates, not just reports
who.title: Who is behind this hub?
who.p1: AYCweb is a B2B digital infrastructure firm based in Asunción, founded and run by Oscar Amarilla. Before writing code, Oscar worked in logistics, manufacturing and procurement. Today AYCweb builds the commercial systems of industrial and healthcare companies in Paraguay: quoting engines, sales automation and operational dashboards.
who.p2: This page exists because the question we get most from abroad is always the same: "who do I talk to in Paraguay?". Now it has an answer.

faq.title: What every investor should know before calling
faq.q1: Is this financial advice or an investment offer?
faq.a1: No. It's commercial intelligence and connections with operators. We don't sell securities, manage third-party funds or recommend instruments.
faq.a2: Verified data with sources, an introductory regulatory framework, reference costs and a map of key players in your chosen sector.
faq.q3: Do you work with foreign investors and companies?
faq.a3: Yes. We guide you through incorporation, banking and local operations, and point you to the professionals you'll need at each stage.
faq.a4: The dossier and the first call: nothing. Ongoing support, representation and digital infrastructure are quoted per scope.
faq.q5: Why AYCweb and not a traditional consultancy?
faq.a5: Because we operate on the ground: we build the commercial systems of real Paraguayan companies and come from the operational side — logistics, manufacturing, procurement — not just from reports.

disclaimer.title: Legal notice · Data as of 06-10-2026
disclaimer.body: The information on this page is for educational and strategic purposes. It does not constitute financial, legal or tax advice; it is not a public offering of securities nor a personalized investment recommendation. AYCweb does not broker securities or manage third-party funds. Every investment decision requires independent verification and your own professional advice. Each figure is accompanied by its source; values may change over time.
